== new dogs added in the latest update -- update checklist ==

i've found 2 new breeds so far -- the skulk variant (was up in the mountains, but i'm unsure if that's its spawning location), and the cake variant (located in the snowy plains with the strawberry, vanilla, & chocolate dogs) [[User:Frozen-booping|Frozen-booping]] ([[User talk:Frozen-booping|talk]]) 06:34, 9 October 2025 (UTC)
